failed_attempts.sql:
WITH influencer_profiles AS (
    -- Identifying influencers as profiles with a significant number of followers (e.g., > 10,000)
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE num_followers > 10000
),
bakery_profiles AS (
    -- Identifying bakeries by searching for 'bakery' in their biography
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'bakery')
)
SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.destination_profile_id
WHERE p.id IN (SELECT id FROM bakery_profiles)
  AND pr.origin_profile_id IN (SELECT id FROM influencer_profiles)
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE num_followers > 10000

bakery_profiles AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'bakery')
)

JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.destination_profile_id

failed_attempts.sql:
WITH influencers AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE num_followers > 10000
),
bakeries AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM profile
    WHERE biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'bakery')
)
SELECT p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.destination_profile_id
JOIN influencers i ON pr.origin_profile_id = i.id
WHERE p.id IN (SELECT id FROM bakeries)
GROUP BY p.id, p.num_followers
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'bakery')
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM profile_relationship pr
    JOIN profile influencer ON pr.origin_profile_id = influencer.id
    WHERE pr.destination_profile_id = p.id
    AND influencer.num_followers > 10000
)
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
